About this item

  • 🏁 Engineered with Premium 8mil Clear PPF: This high-grade material provides exceptional protection with a sleek and sophisticated appearance. The stain-resistant feature maintains its pristine look.
  • 💪 DIY Installation: Our carefully designed product allows for a straightforward installation process that can be completed in just 30 minutes. Removal and replacement are equally simple.
  • 🛡 Reliable Headlight Guard: The 8mil PPF shield acts as a robust barrier, effectively safeguarding your headlights against the harsh elements of the road.
  • 💎 Expertly Cut for Precision: No advanced tools or special skills are needed, our product is precision-cut to fit Rivian R1S & Rivian R1T headlights and enhance protection and aesthetic.
  • ✅ Enhanced Visibility: Our clear PPF offers superior protection and improves visibility as you navigate through rain, fog, and other challenging environments.
  • 🗽 Proudly made in the USA: We take great pride in the quality of our product. Each piece is meticulously crafted in the USA, ensuring exceptional workmanship and the use of premium materials.

Product Description

Meet Adventure with Protection

Protection for the Unique Rivian Headlights

Whether you choose tinted or clear paint protection film, installing this complete set is essential in keeping your adventure vehicle pristine. Easy install makes it worth the effort!

Customers Are Praising the Looks and Ease of Installation

Whether you wish to protect your headlights from rock chips and scratches or you want to tweak the appearance of your Rivian, you'll find they are easy to install and worth the effort!

Does the kit include matching mirror and fog lights?

Yes - light bar, ovals, side lights, fog lights, mirror lights and even front fender reflectors.

What should I choose - Tint or PPF?

The Tint offers the same protective benefits as Clear PPF. Choose tint if you wish to tweak the appearance of your Rivian.

What percentage should I choose?

If you want to tint your lights, but are unsure about what the different percentages mean, we recommend Medium Smoke 50% VLT. This is the most common option.

Is the film easy to remove?

Yes! Very easy to remove - peel one corner, then pull slowly and steadily. It's best to not do it while the Rivian is exposed to direct sunlight.

How does the protection work?

When road debris fly into your car it may chip the paint or in this case the body of your lights. The PPF / Tint acts as a cushion absorbing the sharper edges of the debris and reflecting it back.

Fitment

PPF/Tint covers the entire Headlight without wrapping it around. This allows the installation to be completed without disassembling the lights.

What's in the package

Cutouts, squeegee, soap solution spray bottle, and a link to the install video. Everything you need to complete the installation successfully!

Install Difficulty

We rated this component easy to install, because:

  • Components are laid mostly on flat surfaces
  • Alignment is not difficult
  • Surface is small

Install Time

It only takes 20 minutes to install the headlights PPF / Tint for Rivian R1S / R1T. Protect the front with this Rivian accessory - it's worth it!

What is 30%, 50% and 70% VLT?

Visual Light Transmission & PPF

An important characteristic of tint films is the VLT. It stands for Visible Light Transmission. It means how much of the light in the visible light spectrum will go through that film. For instance, 50% VLT means that half the light will go through the film. The smaller the VLT number, the darker the film, and the less light will be transmitted through it.

        How customer reviews and ratings work

        Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

        To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

        Amazon Customer
        5 out of 5 stars
        Perfect - no issue. Quality and precise cuts.
        Great instructions and quality PPF! Take your time, watch the video and you’ll have no issues. Pic of the job completed so you see the difference in transparency. I live in Chicago and they have survived ice, snow, 100+ temps and cicadas!

        There was a problem filtering reviews right now. Please try again later.

        Chris
        5.0 out of 5 stars Great product & company
        Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2023
        Size: Gen1 (2021-2024)Color: Dark Smoke (30% VLT)Verified Purchase
        I installed this product in about 10 min. It was very easy to install and the end result looks amazing and very high end. I installed to product on the middle light bar and didn’t pay attention that the top edge hadn’t really laid flat during the curing process so dirt and debris was starting to get under it. I emailed the company to explain to them it was my fault and I needed to either pay for a replacement strip or pay for a new kit. The company told me that because I’d been honest with them about my error, they were going to send me a new kit complimentary. As a business owner myself, I really appreciate the gesture. I highly recommend this product, and especially this company!!
        Read more
        3 people found this helpful
        Helpful
         Report
        JToso
        5.0 out of 5 stars Looks good!
        Reviewed in the United States on September 5, 2024
        Size: Gen1 (2021-2024)Color: Light Smoke (70% VLT)Verified Purchase
        Washed the truck and started installing these. After 10 min, wanted to throw it away. After 20 min, loved it. PPF is not easy if you have no practice. Keep working it with the tool and eventually the stickiness will start clinging to the light housing.
        Read more

        Samuel Y.
        4.0 out of 5 stars The film didnt survive the Texas freeze
        Reviewed in the United States on May 19, 2023
        Size: Gen1 (2021-2024)Color: Dark Smoke (30% VLT)Verified Purchase
        We had a winter storm come through a week after I installed mine and the edges look shrivelled and now has a wavy edge along the film edge over on the center driving light bar. They look nice but wish it didnt have that rough edge and up close doesnt look all that good.

        Armando Sarmiento
        5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent product and customer service
        Reviewed in the United States on July 11, 2023
        Size: Gen1 (2021-2024)Color: Light Smoke (70% VLT)Verified Purchase
        Excellent protection and a style upgrade for my Rivian R1S! These wraps are made with a durable material and are effective protection against scratches and debris without compromising brightness. Applying the pre-cut wraps was a breeze, with no bubbles or creases. There are instructional videos that were very helpful. They are a fantastic investment for my Rivian. They provide reliable protection and enhance the vehicle's style. Don't hesitate to give your Rivian this impressive upgrade!
        Read more
